name: node-fill-range
title: node-fill-range
summary: node module to fill in a range of numbers or letters
description:
node module to fill in a range of numbers or letters
fill-range can optionally pass an increment or `step` to use, or create a
regex-compatible range with `options.toRegex`
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-fill-range because node module to fill in a range of numbers or letters.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-fill-range as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-fill-range with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-fill-range --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
